Wiki / Settings & saves

Settings & saves

Multiple save files, three difficulties, and a deep options menu — display scaling, visuals, accessibility, and more.

Your files

Multi-save system

Save slots

Keep multiple named saves, each with its own difficulty. The main menu lists them with money, level, days, and achievements; sort by recent or name, and rename or delete any slot. Saves are encrypted in your browser.

Autosave & manual

Autosave runs on your chosen interval (30s, 45s, 60s, 120s, 240s, or Never), and Ctrl+S saves on demand. A corrupt save is preserved rather than overwritten.

Import / export

Export any save to a code or file and re-import it later or on another device. Legacy export codes are supported, and old single-save files migrate automatically.

Saves live in your browser, so clearing site data wipes them. Export a backup first. To remove a single save, use the Delete button next to it in the main-menu list — there's no undo.

Difficulty

Game modes

Chosen when you create a save; it can't be changed later.

ModeCostsIncomeFor…
Easy−15%+15%Newcomers / relaxed play
NormalbaselinebaselineThe intended experience
Hard+50%−30%Veterans / a challenge
Options

Every setting

Display

  • GUI scale — 50–150% with an Auto preset.
  • Text scale — 70–150% (S / M / L / XL).

Visuals

  • High Quality FX, Light / Dark theme
  • Floating Shakes, Screen Shake
  • Animate Numbers, Better Animations
  • Atmosphere (background picker)

Gameplay

  • Show Passive Income ($/s)
  • Auto-Claim Goals, Tab Badges
  • Auto-Save interval, Notification duration
  • Auto-Pause on idle, Date format

Accessibility

  • Reduce Motion, High Contrast
  • Large Text mode
  • Number format — compact, custom, worded (short / long scale), or full digits
Atmosphere

14 backgrounds & music

Backgrounds

Fourteen atmospheres in the picker — including Cozy Cafe, RGB Glow, Sunset City, Winter Landscape, Fall Forest, Beach, Sapphire Waves, Lounge, and Rainforest Cafe. Switching light/dark picks a fitting default automatically.

Music player

A built-in player with 4 tracks — Afternoon, Milkshakes, Beginning, and Empire — with play/pause, skip, ±10 s seek, volume, and direct track selection.

Help & about

An in-game Help panel with replayable tutorials and reference sections, and an About panel with version info, credits, and the full EULA.

Achievements & statsTrack your empire Tips & strategyPlay smarter
